freetools.title: Free Audio & Video Conversion Tools
freetools.subtitle: Convert audio and video files directly in your browser - 100% private, no uploads required

videoToAudio.title: Video to Audio Converter
videoToAudio.description: Extract audio from video files (MP4, AVI, MOV, etc.)
videoToAudio.seoTitle: How to Convert Video to Audio
videoToAudio.seoDescription: Our video to audio converter extracts high-quality audio from any video format. All processing happens in your browser - your files never leave your device. Perfect for extracting podcasts, music, or interviews from video files.

audioCompression.title: Audio Compression Tool
audioCompression.description: Reduce audio file size while maintaining quality
audioCompression.seoDescription: Compress large audio files to smaller sizes without significant quality loss. Choose from multiple formats and compression levels to find the perfect balance between file size and audio quality.

mp3ToWav.title: MP3 to WAV Converter
mp3ToWav.description: Convert MP3 files to uncompressed WAV format
mp3ToWav.seoDescription: Convert compressed MP3 files to uncompressed WAV format for professional audio editing. WAV files provide lossless audio quality, making them ideal for music production and audio engineering.

srtTester.title: SRT Subtitle Tester & Validator
srtTester.description: Test and validate SRT subtitle files with video preview
srtTester.seoDescription: Upload your video and SRT subtitle file to preview how they look together. Our validator checks for common issues like timing errors, overlaps, and formatting problems - all in your browser.
srtTester.srtExplanation: SRT (SubRip Subtitle) is the most common subtitle format used for videos. It contains the subtitle text along with start and end timestamps. Our tool helps you validate that your SRT file is properly formatted and synced with your video.
srtTester.issue1: Timing errors (end time before start time)
srtTester.feature1Description: Automatically detect and report SRT formatting issues and timing errors
srtTester.feature2Description: See exactly how your subtitles will look on your video before publishing
srtTester.feature3Description: Identify overlaps, timing issues, and readability problems

srtTester.dragDropVideo: Drag & drop or click to select
srtTester.dragDropSRT: Drag & drop or click to select
srtTester.noErrors: ✓ No errors found! Your SRT file looks good
srtTester.issuesFound: issues found in your SRT file
srtTester.privacyMessage: All validation happens in your browser. Your video and subtitle files never leave your device.

converter.uploadPrompt: Drop your file here or click to browse
converter.dragDrop: Drag and drop or click to select a file
converter.conversionError: Failed to convert file. Please try again.
converter.privacyMessage: All conversions happen in your browser. Your files never leave your device and are not uploaded to any server.

privacy.title: Complete Privacy
privacy.description: All processing happens in your browser. No uploads, no cloud storage, no tracking.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Convert files instantly without waiting for uploads or downloads from servers.

free.title: 100% Free
free.description: All tools are completely free with no file size limits or usage restrictions.
